title: Soldier's Delight (A Farmer's Delight Add-on)
description: Adding preservation methods from Rationcraft to Farmer's Delight
body:
Solder's Delight is an add-on for [Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) that adds compatibility with [Rationcraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rationcraft). This is great for Roleplaying or with mods that make food rot.





Main Features currently include 3 meals that can be heated up when crafted with water

MRE Beef stew
MRE Spagheti (pasta with meatballs)

MRE Veggie Omelette (known as the vomlette by the American Military)

I plan on doing more of the meals but for now I did three common American MREs, If you have any reccomondations or your country has a popular (or notorious) MRE feel free to join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/gUefw6KbX4) to let us know
